NudeStudios · SS 2025

The Invisible Halter

Sticky Halter Bra
$59.95 AUD
Meet your new going-out essential ✨

Made from 100% silicone for a smooth, natural feel — The Invisible Halter gives you support, lift and security without ruining the outfit. The clear halter strap adds extra hold while staying practically invisible.

Created by three sisters who were sick of missing out on cute backless, strapless and low-cut tops just because finding a supportive bra felt impossible. As girls with bigger boobs, we knew the struggle all too well — so we spent months testing, wearing, sweating, dancing, adjusting and perfecting this bra.

She's comfy, reusable, confidence-boosting and honestly a lifesaver for every "wait… what bra do I wear with this?" moment. From one group of big-boob girls to another — we got you 🤍

Select Size
100% silicone — smooth, natural, skin-like feel
Clear halter strap for invisible extra support
Perfect for backless, strapless and low-cut styles
Reusable · Hand wash gently after each wear
01

Lifts &
supports

100% silicone moulds to your body for a natural lift and real support — no padding, no wires, no compromises.

02

Truly
invisible

The clear halter strap keeps everything in place without showing. Wear the top you actually want to wear.

NudeStudios · SS 2025

The Invisible Halter

Double The Stick
$64.95 AUD
Meet the bra that finally does both ✨

Made from 100% silicone with adhesive on both sides — this bra not only lifts and supports you, but also keeps your top exactly where it's supposed to be. No slipping, no flashing, no stressing.

Created by three sisters who were tired of choosing between support or actually being able to wear the tops we loved. As girls with bigger boobs, we know the struggle — slipping tops, awkward gaps, no support, constantly readjusting… the list goes on.

After months of testing (through dinners, nights out, hot girl walks and way too many outfit changes), we created the ultimate solution. Perfect for backless, strapless, low-cut or tricky tops that normally feel impossible to wear with bigger boobs. Honestly, it's the kind of product that makes you wonder how you ever got dressed without it 🤍

Select Size
100% silicone — adhesive on both sides
Lifts and supports while holding your top in place
No slipping, no flashing — all night long
Reusable · Hand wash gently after each wear
01

Sticks
both ways

Adhesive on both sides means your bra lifts you AND keeps your top from going anywhere. Finally, a solution that does everything.

02

No more
adjusting

Tested through dinners, nights out and hot girl walks. Once it's on, it stays on — so you can actually enjoy your night.
